description_long: This is an acoustic guitar with a classic dreadnought body shape, featuring a rich, dark wood grain finish on both the front and back. The soundboard has a circular sound hole bordered by a light-colored ring, and the bridge is a contrasting dark wood with white bridge pins and a white saddle. The neck is long and slender, leading up to a headstock with six tuning pegs arranged symmetrically, three on each side. The back and sides of the guitar display a consistent wood grain pattern, and the body is outlined with a thin, light binding. The overall construction suggests a traditional, high-quality acoustic instrument suitable for street performances or casual play in urban parks. The guitar's design is both functional and visually appealing, with a smooth, glossy finish that highlights the natural wood texture.
description: A classic acoustic guitar with a dark wood finish, circular sound hole, and six tuning pegs, featuring a glossy, well-crafted body and neck.
description_view_0: Front view showing the sound hole, bridge, strings, and the full fretboard up to the headstock.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim body depth and the curvature of the top and back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous wood grain pattern and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again highlighting the guitar's thin body and the smooth transition between the neck and body.
attribute_headstock_design: Symmetrical headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, traditional acoustic shape
